text: Wandering through this modern, glass-walled space, I am enveloped by an ambiance that is both stark and prepared, as if anticipating significance or a sudden event. The repetitive 'th th th th' that I hear echoes quietly inside me, like footsteps or a pulse—a minimalist rhythm accentuating the emptiness of the room and my awareness of it. I feel expectant, on the edge of discovery, and yet curiously detached, conscious that significance often emerges in the space between anticipation and event.
